title: Logo Vectorization + Brand Identity Kit — HaulAway (junk removal / vehicle-wrap-ready)
one_line_ask: Vectorize and clean up HaulAway's existing raster logo to print-ready quality, then build the full set of brand variations (master vector, horizontal, stacked, icon-only HA mark, one-color knockouts, a lime-on-black trailer-wrap hero) plus a font + color-usage reference and a presentation board — all wrap/shirt/print ready.

issues: Slight JPEG-style compression softness around edges (acceptable per brief)
Very slight clockwise tilt (~2.5°, as required)
Background is near-white (#F4F4F2), not pure white (acceptable per brief)
Logo is slightly low-resolution, as expected for a client PNG
Very slight clockwise rotation is present but barely perceptible — could be marginally more pronounced to ensure auto-straighten has clear work to do
Compression softness is minimal; edge halos are subtle but acceptable for a source asset
The 'H' letterform in the monogram has black negative-space squares that could read as slightly ambiguous at very small sizes
